mapper.sql: id, cost_id, student_id, amount_due, pay_status, paid_time, voucher_attach_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delflag
mapper.select: select d.id as detailId, d.student_id as studentId, us.real_name as studentName, d.amount_due as amountDue, d.pay_status as payStatus, d.paid_time as paidTime, d.voucher_attach_id as voucherAttachId, sa.name as voucherName, sa.bucket as voucherBucket, sa.path as voucherPath, case when d.student_id = #{studentId} then 1 else 0 end as isCurrentUser from dm_shared_cost_detail d left join user_student us on us.id = d.student_id and us.delflag = 0 left join dm_system.sys_attach sa on sa.id = d.voucher_attach_id and sa.delflag = 0 where d.cost_id = #{costId} and d.delflag = 0 order by us.real_name
